reasons: cand_bucket 是当前唯一被结构化 pilot summary 直接判定为 GO 的主证据候选，并且已经用 fixed/harmed/no_effect 把 headline +3pp 增益分解为可审计的样本级结构。
cand_protocol 同样重要，但它的职责是 runtime-lineage 与 claim-to-asset credibility closure，更适合作为 support lane，而不是本轮唯一前进候选。
cand_observer_split 现在只应保留为 framing claim；它依赖 bucket、protocol 与 minimal seed evidence 才能成立，不能再被当成单独 execution candidate。
cand_minimal_scope 与 cand_boundary_audit 仍然是合理备选，但当前没有比 cand_bucket 更直接、更闭环的 pilot 支持，不值得在此时重新分散主线。
next_actions: Keep cand_bucket as the main evidence lane and carry cand_protocol as an appendix-grade support lane.
Do not open a new controller family or generic scheduler line in iter_002.
Treat the current pilot closure as sufficient evidence closure for this iteration and move the workflow into result synthesis and writing.
When writing, claim only bucket-level gain decomposition, runtime-lineage auditability, and minimal seed sign consistency.
